title: Wait a sec who killed Kaji
display_title: Wait a sec who killed Kaji
wikitext:
[]: Wait a sec! who killed Kaji?             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:16 am I believe this has already been posted, But I did search "who killed Kaji?" and I got nothin. My only question is! Did Misato do it? I have seen a few things that make me wonder. I was playing an eva related quiz, the question who killed Kaji came up, Misato, gendo, rie, none of the above? OF COURSE i choose none of the above! But Misato was the right answer. Now at this point I'm like WTF MATE! After watching this stupidly funny cospalay video [url]http://video.google.ca/videoplay?docid=5653121661745514397&q=evangelion[/url] I begin to wonder again! Now in the show I beleive Misato gives her gun to the secret agent people, correct me if I'm wrong! And if i recall Kaji was killed befor they gave her gun back! So again I'm like WTF MATE!

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:37 am It mustn't be Misato. When she knew Kaji was dead she cried so hyterically. If she could kill Kaji in cold blood and cry hysterically shortly afterwards she must be crazy. I suppose it would be some Nerv or Seele poeple who killed Kaji?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:41 am See thats what I've always thought aswell! this video and quiz piss me off! If I had a link to the quiz I'd give it but I don't remeber, I just google things and hope something comes out good

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:03 am Anno has stated that the killer was just some minor functionary. The NPC re-edit of ep21 removes the cut to Misato's name-plate, replacing it with an exterior view of the apartment block, to reduce the inadvertent misdirection.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:04 am awsome work MR. T

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:14 am I hear the Manga hints it towards Gendo's direction, though.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:16 am Screw the manga's anno's word is good enough for me!

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:18 am TheBlueTree wrote: Screw the manga's anno's word is good enough for me!

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:22 am shocking aint it?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:35 am TheBlueTree wrote: awsome work MR. T

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:39 am TheBlueTree wrote: Screw the manga's anno's word is good enough for me!

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:41 am Doesn't anyone here take annos word as the truth? I mean it is HIS show he SHOULD (not does but should) know these kinds of things!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:41 am Also, time to link the awesome "Clue" game.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:56 am Though I really could see we're just naming the killer who could be just an hitman. What with Third Impact just around the corner I'm sure SEELE and NERV were busy enough to send their high ranking officers to kill a mole.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:36 am Hope ya'll looked at the thread I linked to, and, to lower the ambiguity factor: It was an agent from Seele. When Kaji goes to free Fuyutsuki in #21'... FUYUTSUKI: Oh, it's you. Kaji: Long time no see. I've put the guards outside to sleep for a while. FUYUTSUKI: This will cost you your life. Kaji: I just want to get closer to the truth within myself. Besides, it looks like they'll find out that I diverted the sample of Adam to Commander Ikari , so I have to guard my own interests too, or various bad things will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Jul 14, 2006 5:27 am Legend of the Past wrote: I hear the Manga hints it towards Gendo's direction, though.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:33 am Space Penis wrote: Legend of the Past wrote: I hear the Manga hints it towards Gendo's direction, though.

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:41 am wayniac wrote: In the Manga, the killer is wearing a glove similar to Gendo's.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:51 am Mr. Tines wrote: Also, time to link the awesome "Clue" game.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Jul 14, 2006 10:02 am Space Penis wrote: Frankly, the whole "Misato killed Kaji" thing has always left me completely baffled as to why anyone beleived that. But hey, whatever.
